payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a smooth, flat panel surface and a small white rectangular sticker near the upper-right; the right and bottom edges of the cabinet are cropped in the image and no handle is visible — estimated distance about 1.5 meters from the camera.
